pr_title: Add customer notification sender for order-status updates
pr_description: Adds send_notification() so the order pipeline can email customers when their order status changes.
injected_issue: send_notification() mixes print() debugging statements with the module's own logger, and leaves a large block of commented-out legacy implementation in place instead of being deleted -- dead code and inconsistent logging left behind from development.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: Both tests only assert on the boolean return value of send_notification(); they don't inspect stdout or check for leftover commented code, so the print statements and dead code block have no effect on pass/fail.
